input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.4.1.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.4.1.5
            TITLE: checkered flag - run has been completed.  exit the course at the designated point.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.4.1.5: Checkered Flag - Run has been completed.  Exit the course at the designated point.
D.4.1.5 Checkered Flag - Run has been completed.  Exit the course at the designated point.

final_answer: D.4.1.5 Checkered Flag - Run has been completed. Exit the course at the designated point.
